channel.title: Arduino on Adam Fowler
channel.description: Recent content in Arduino on Adam Fowler

item.title: Led Matrix
item.description: The Build: Electronics: ESP32 Dev Board 3 x 5M WSB12B LED strips Power Cable 150W 5V Power Supply Frame: Diffusion material (Thin curtain) Wood Backing board (Foam core board) Tools: Solding Iron Solder Wire Used 2 1"x3"x6’ pine boards Used 2 foam core boards from the dollar store User a curtain from the dollar store Start by testing all the compoents are working. After all the componets are confirmed to be working I cut the leds down to 1m lengths and re-wired the ends to allow them to be mounted on the backing board.
